items.title: [正面] I am writing this review as an appreciation for th...
items.summary:
I am writing this review as an appreciation for this game and also to hopefully be helpful for new players that might stumble upon this underrated gem in the future 

As other reviews have pointed out , Morimens is an amazing card game with gameplay and systems that are found in similar titles like Slay the Spire (Arguably the most similar) , Library of Ruina , Darkest Dungeon and other games , mixed with an engaging Lovecraftian storyline and great visuals. If you're a fan of those games , there's high chance you will enjoy Morimens. 

While that's enough to sum up the overall gist of the game for anyone who reads it to know if they'd be interested enough to give it a try , i have to make it clear that at the end of the day Morimens IS still a Gacha game , which unfortunately is nowhere to be seen in the description of the game or the tags , which can easily cause wrong expectations when trying to get into the game , that i'll do my best to clear up momentarily for anyone that wants to give it a try.

- Being a Gacha game , if you don't have any experience with Gacha titles , it's very likely that you'll be overwhelmed by all the different currencies and how you're supposed to manage your account. Additionally , since this is a turn-based game , Similar to a title like Honkai Star Rail , there's a chance that if you spend your resources on building weak units and end up soft-locking yourself out of harder content as you wont be able to do them for more resources , and it's heavily advised to look up a guide on how to progress in this game if you're wanting to dive deep into it. Many negative reviews i've seen are people complaining that they're overwhlemed by all the currency as they didn't know they're getting themselves into a Gacha or don't even know what it is.

That being said , Morimens is extremely generous with both their Gacha rates for Characters and Weapons , and also the amount of resources they give you and how many pulls you get to get your teams built , also having certain items that allow you to choose whichever character you want from the base banner , and as long as you don't simply waste them , you'll have a very easy time progressing through the game and after building a good team , spending your resources on any units that you like.

- There's also the problem of the english Translation , as many have pointed out , as it's apparently done through AI , and despite being very well translated , it can be very weird and off-putting in the story mode more often than not.

TLDR ; if you are experienced with gacha games and enjoy card games like Slay the Spire , you'll have an amazing time with Morimens , and if you're inexperienced with Gacha titles but like card games , be sure to give it a try , and look up for guides to help you manage your accounts and resources , like Flares on Youtube.

Hope this review will be helpful to all players that come across this game and want to give it a try

items.title: [正面] I don't understand how this game is soo unpopular!
items.summary: I don't understand how this game is soo unpopular!

items.title: [负面] If you're a talented artist designing a cool Slay ...
items.summary: If you're a talented artist designing a cool Slay the Spire x Limbus Company clone like the devs of this game are, please consider narrowing the scope by like 35% and make the story something that I can understand without a glossary. There's a reason other roguelike deckbuilders don't need 9,000 currencies and daily login bonuses to be fun.

items.title: [正面] 画风克味浓厚，剧情十分“甜蜜”，除了卡等级和特效经费欠缺外，其他都还可以。
